headlines: Charles Schwab launches 'Schwab Crypto' page — spot Bitcoin & Ethereum trading coming
Coinbase wins conditional OK from OCC for a national trust charter
Bitcoin slips as spot‑ETF flows turn mixed and Good Friday halts institutional flows
Q1 2026 DeFi hacks drop but still cost $168–169M across 34 projects
Binance keeps top derivatives market share as derivatives volume hits $18.6T in Q1 2026

articles.title: Charles Schwab to offer spot Bitcoin and Ethereum via 'Schwab Crypto' (H1 2026)
articles.summary: Charles Schwab added a ‘Schwab Crypto’ page and says a spot BTC and ETH trading account is coming soon. If rolled out, Schwab’s move would open direct crypto buying for millions of retail brokerage clients and could bring very large new demand to the market.

articles.title: Coinbase gets conditional approval from the OCC for a national trust charter
articles.summary: The Office of the Comptroller of the Currency has given Coinbase conditional approval to form a national trust company. That is a major regulatory milestone: a final charter would let Coinbase offer federally supervised custody and trust services for digital assets once it meets the OCC’s conditions.

articles.title: Bitcoin dips below ~$67K as spot‑ETF flows turn mixed and Good Friday pauses institutional activity
articles.summary: Bitcoin fell to the mid‑$60k range after renewed selling and a day when ETF creation/redemption and some CME futures were paused for Good Friday. ETF flows were mixed that week, leaving BTC exposed to thinner weekend liquidity and renewed price pressure.
articles.source: The Coin Republic + CryptoMist market coverage

articles.title: Q1 2026 DeFi hacks fall but still cost about $168.6M across 34 protocols
articles.summary: DeFi exploits dropped year‑on‑year in Q1, but attackers still stole roughly $168.6 million from 34 projects. The report highlights that private‑key compromises and smart‑contract bugs remain the main risks to decentralized finance.

articles.title: Binance leads Q1 derivatives volumes as total crypto derivatives hit $18.6 trillion
articles.summary: Derivatives stayed dominant in Q1 2026 with roughly $18.6T of volume; Binance remained the top derivatives venue while new perp‑DEXs like Hyperliquid cracked the top ten. The report underlines how futures and perpetuals still drive most trading activity.

articles.title: Arkham flags a 500 BTC wallet outflow linked to Riot Platforms — miner selling continues
articles.summary: On‑chain analytics linked a 500 BTC outflow to a wallet associated with Riot Platforms, signaling another possible miner or treasury sale. Listed miners selling reserves can add sustained selling pressure to Bitcoin markets.
articles.source: Cointelegraph reporting on Arkham on‑chain data

articles.title: U.S. stablecoin rulemaking moves forward — regulators schedule April rule sessions under the GENIUS Act
articles.summary: U.S. agencies are moving on stablecoin rules tied to the GENIUS Act: credit‑union and banking regulators have set comment windows and the FDIC has scheduled related rule sessions in early April. The rulemaking will shape which institutions can issue or custody payment stablecoins and how reserves are held.
articles.source: NCUA notice + industry reporting on planned FDIC rule sessions

articles.title: Solana under pressure — DEX volume and on‑chain activity slump, SOL price weakens
articles.summary: Solana’s decentralized exchange volumes and network activity have fallen sharply, putting technical pressure on SOL. Lower DEX volumes and shrinking stablecoin liquidity on Solana increase downside risk for the token until activity recovers.
